IISER IAT NISER NEST IISc Entrance ISI Admission Physics • Chemistry • Biology • Maths 500+ PYQ Questions Test Series Expert Solutions IISER IAT NISER NEST IISc Entrance ISI Admission Physics • Chemistry • Biology • Maths 500+ PYQ Questions Test Series Expert Solutions

Why Vigyan.prep?

Everything you need to crack IISER, NISER, and top research institute exams

Curated Question Banks

500+ hand-picked past-year questions with detailed solutions covering Physics, Chemistry, Biology, and Mathematics.

Adaptive Test Series

AI-powered mock tests that adapt to your strengths and weaknesses, mirroring the exact exam pattern of IAT and NEST.

Research-Level Depth

Go beyond textbooks. Our content is designed by researchers and alumni from IISER, IISc, and NISER to build real scientific intuition.

Peer Community

Join 10,000+ aspirants discussing strategies, sharing notes, and motivating each other in our active student community.

Structured Study Plans

Week-by-week study schedules tailored for IAT, NEST, and IISc entrance exams based on proven strategies of toppers.

Instant Doubt Resolution

Get your doubts answered within hours by our expert panel of science graduates and researchers. Never stay stuck.
